issues.title: v0.5.0 Technical audit: coverage gaps and P0/P1/P2 items
issues.description:
Technical audit of v0.4.5 identified significant coverage gaps and unimplemented features to address before v0.5.0.

## Coverage statistics

| Category | Files | Tests | Coverage |
|----------|-------|-------|----------|
| CLI Commands | 84 | 3 | 3.6% |
| Adapters | 61 | 3 | 4.9% |
| Exporters | 20 | 3 | 15% |
| Services | 153 | sparse | <30% |
| **Total** | **631** | **114** | **~18%** |

## Critical gaps (P0)

### 1. CLEAR framework evaluation
- File: `src/adapters/base/perfect-agent-utils.ts`
- 5 evaluation metrics: correctness, latency, efficiency, accuracy, robustness
- Status: Generated stubs made runnable (latency measures; others skip with details). Full agent-specific evals remain for adopters.

### 2. Export tests
- File: `tests/integration/cli/export.test.ts`
- kagent test: fixed (directory output). Others: langchain python, crewai python, gitlab-agent, docker, kubernetes, npm, drupal, json output, backup - need adapter completion or test alignment.

## P1: Skipped test suites
- anthropic.adapter.test.ts, validation.service.test.ts, conformance.service.test.ts, langchain-migration.service.test.ts, langgraph.validator.test.ts, crewai.validator.test.ts, mcp-integration.test.ts

## P1: Code quality
- taxonomy.service.ts:214 confidence hardcoded 0.8
- opentelemetry.adapter.ts:326 returns undefined
- cursor/adapter.ts:281 throws Not implemented
- version-detection.service.ts:223 major migration not supported

## P2: Infrastructure
- File watching in agents-md.service.ts, llms-txt.service.ts
- Release automation notifications
- Buildkit migration TODOs

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Test coverage 50%+
- [ ] All P0 items resolved
- [ ] No skipped test suites (or documented and tracked)
- [ ] CLEAR framework runnable (stubs implemented)

/label ~"technical-debt" ~testing ~audit
/milestone %v0.5.0
